# gitignore-template

Nix package definition for `gitignore-template` v1.2.4, a Python CLI tool that fetches `.gitignore` templates from GitHub using fuzzy name matching.

|------|-------------|
| [default.nix](./default.nix) | `buildPythonApplication` derivation; exposes `mainProgram="gitignore-template"`, MIT license, owner `JonBoyleCoding`. |

- **Build backend:** `pdm-pep517` (nativeBuildInputs)

`default.nix` follows same structure as sibling packages under `pkgs/`. Root [overlay.nix](../../overlay.nix) surfaces this derivation; [ci.nix](../../ci.nix) builds it in CI. Template for new packages: [pkgs/example-package/default.nix](../example-package/default.nix).
